form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr2) over 2260m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 5th-5.61 beaten 7 m by Holy Camp Dillon (2:45.30) in NR up to 62 on April 1 at $2.60. Should get every chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into tenth behind Nosaer at Penrith over 1720m in a NR up to 67 on March 5 at $10. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 2030m after showing early pace at Newcastle was 2nd-5.1 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Rudy Gee (2:23.20) in NR up to 65 on February 20 at $1.75. Drawn well and can go close in his first outing for a new yard.

Before that 6th (Fr2) over 1730m at this track beaten 30 m by Megs Boy (2:01.30) in NR up to 75 on March 25 at $81. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into tenth after showing early speed, behind Fugitive at Menangle over 2300m in a NR up to 80 on February 7 at $19. Better placed.
